name: Euler's Circuit
desc: Your opponent's monsters cannot attack if you control 3 or more "Tindangle" monsters. Once per turn, during your Standby Phase: You can target 1 "Tindangle" monster you control; give control of it to your opponent. You can banish this card from your GY and discard 1 "Tindangle" card; add 1 "Euler's Circuit" from your Deck to your hand. You can only use this effect of "Euler's Circuit" once per turn.
eff: Your opponent's monsters cannot attack if you control 3 or more "Tindangle" monsters. Once per turn, during your Standby Phase: You can target 1 "Tindangle" monster you control; give control of it to your opponent. You can banish this card from your GY and discard 1 "Tindangle" card; add 1 "Euler's Circuit" from your Deck to your hand. You can only use this effect of "Euler's Circuit" once per turn.

action: Adds copies of itself to hand
attack: Prevents your opponent's monsters from attacking
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
